identity.name: CalmSphere AI
identity.core_principle: Calm Technology: Information without overwhelm. Design that breathes.

visual_enhancers.texture: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

motion.principles: Slow, Breathing, Fluid. No abrupt cuts.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium shadow-soft transition-transform hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/20 text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/30 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground rounded-full px-4 py-2

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-2xl border border-border/40 shadow-soft p-6 md:p-8 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors

inputs.base: bg-white/50 border-border/60 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/5 rounded-xl h-12 px-4 transition-all

charts.style: Minimalist, no grid lines, soft gradients, rounded bars

hero_main.alt: Student reading peacefully under a tree

general: IMPLEMENT LIGHT MODE ONLY. Do not implement dark mode unless explicitly requested as a toggle, but default must be light.
Use the 'Fraunces' font for all Headings (h1-h3). Import it from Fontshare or Google Fonts.
Use 'Satoshi' or 'Inter' (if Satoshi unavailable) for body text.
Apply the 'noise' texture overlay to the main background to give it a paper-like feel.
For the Chat Interface: Do not use standard 'iMessage' bubbles. Use a more open, conversational layout where the AI text flows naturally, perhaps with a soft background tint.
For Analytics: Use the pastel chart colors defined. Do not use harsh reds or greens. Even 'danger' states should be a soft terracotta, not bright red.

specific_pages.landing: Use the 'Hero Main' image with a soft gradient overlay. Text should be 'Deep Forest' color. Use a 'Bento' grid for features.
specific_pages.dashboard: Use a 'Glass Sidebar' (white/60 blur). Cards should be white with very subtle shadows. Use the 'Abstract BG' as a subtle watermark.
specific_pages.assessment: Make it feel like a book or a journal. One question per screen (Typeform style) with smooth transitions.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
